task: Insurance policy cancellation + unearned-premium refund with Decision C hardened soft-skip. POST /api/v1/insurance/policies/:id/cancel sets policy.status='cancelled' + cancelled_on + cancel_reason and stops FUTURE not-yet-issued payment_schedule rows via the explicit bill_status column (issued bills untouched). The pro-rated unearned premium posts as a SEPARATE credit line via existing createJournalEntry() (NOT a negative premium). Decision C: if ap_control/expense_default are NOT mapped, the cancel STILL succeeds, a CRITICAL audit event is emitted, and a DURABLE insurance.refund_obligation row is persisted (tenant_id, policy_id, amount_cents, debit/credit roles, deterministic_memo) — drainable/auto-postable via POST /api/v1/insurance/refund-obligations/post-pending, deduped by deterministic memo so retries never double-post. A CI + startup COA-roles guard (verify:coa-roles) verifies every active operating carrier maps the two roles.
financial_rule: All refund posting goes ONLY through the existing accounting service createJournalEntry() (balanced debit/credit, source='auto'). No new financial ledger code. Accounts resolved via the existing coa-roles resolver. Unmapped carriers fall back to a durable obligation row + CRITICAL audit instead of silently skipping.
